glosses.ja: エピソード; 出来事

translations.es: Vamos a ver el episodio esta noche.
translations.de: Wir schauen die Folge heute Abend.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 그 에피소드를 볼 거야.
translations.ru: Мы смотрим эту серию сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Vamos assistir ao episódio hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay bọn mình xem tập này.
translations.id: Kita menonton episode itu malam ini.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se díváme na díl.
translations.ja: 今夜はそのエピソードを見る。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/indefinite), commonly used for 'we'; triggers 3rd person singular agreement on the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular agreeing with 'on'; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Definite article with elision before vowel-initial noun; masculine singular determiner for the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'regarde'.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'soir' to form a temporal NP ('ce soir').
Common noun, masculine singular; head of temporal NP functioning as an adverbial time complement ('tonight').

translations.es: Me perdí el episodio de ayer.
translations.de: Ich habe die gestrige Folge verpasst.
translations.vi: Tôi đã bỏ lỡ tập hôm qua.
translations.nl: Ik heb de aflevering van gisteren gemist.
translations.hi: मैंने कल का एपिसोड मिस कर दिया.
translations.nb: Jeg gikk glipp av gårsdagens episode.
translations.da: Jeg gik glip af gårsdagens afsnit.
translations.ja: 昨日のエピソードを見逃した。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before vowel; 1st person singular subject of 'ai'.
Auxiliary in present indicative, 1st person singular; forms the passé composé with the past participle 'raté'.
Past participle used in compound past with 'avoir'; lexical verb meaning 'to miss'; no participle agreement since the direct object follows.
Definite article with elision before vowel-initial noun; masculine singular determiner for the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'raté'.
Preposition 'de' with elision before vowel; introduces the postnominal modifier.
Adverb meaning 'yesterday'; with 'de' forms 'd'hier', an adverbial-origin modifier specifying the episode's time.

sentences.target: Tu télécharges l'épisode pour le train.

translations.fr: Tu télécharges l'épisode pour le train.
translations.en: You’re downloading the episode for the train.
translations.es: Estás descargando el episodio para verlo en el tren.
translations.de: Du lädst die Folge für die Zugfahrt herunter.
translations.it: Stai scaricando l'episodio per il viaggio in treno.
translations.ko: 기차에서 보려고 그 에피소드를 다운로드하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在下载这一集准备在火车上看。
translations.yue: 你而家下載呢一集準備喺火車上睇。
translations.ru: Ты скачиваешь серию, чтобы посмотреть в поезде.
translations.pt: Você está baixando o episódio para ver no trem.
translations.he: אתה מוריד את הפרק כדי לראות אותו ברכבת.
translations.vi: Bạn đang tải tập về để xem trên tàu.
translations.ar: أنت تُنزّل الحلقة لمشاهدتها في القطار.
translations.nl: Je downloadt de aflevering om in de trein te kijken.
translations.uk: Ти завантажуєш серію, щоб дивитися в потязі.
translations.hu: Letöltöd az epizódot, hogy a vonaton nézd.
translations.hi: तुम ट्रेन में देखने के लिए एपिसोड डाउनलोड कर रहे हो.
translations.pl: Pobierasz odcinek, żeby obejrzeć go w pociągu.
translations.el: Κατεβάζεις το επεισόδιο για να το δεις στο τρένο.
translations.nb: Du laster ned episoden for å se den på toget.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mengunduh episodenya untuk ditonton di kereta.
translations.sv: Du laddar ner avsnittet för att se det på tåget.
translations.ro: Descarci episodul ca să-l vezi în tren.
translations.cs: Stahuješ díl, abys ho sledoval ve vlaku.
translations.da: Du downloader afsnittet for at se det i toget.
translations.fi: Lataat jakson, jotta voit katsoa sen junassa.
translations.ja: 電車で見るためにそのエピソードをダウンロードしている。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, taking 'l'épisode' as direct object.
Definite article with elision before vowel-initial noun; masculine singular determiner for the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'télécharges'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/destination phrase ('pour le train').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'train'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Cet épisode me fait trop rire.

translations.fr: Cet épisode me fait trop rire.
translations.en: This episode makes me laugh so much.
translations.es: Este episodio me hace reír muchísimo.
translations.de: Diese Folge bringt mich total zum Lachen.
translations.it: Questo episodio mi fa ridere tantissimo.
translations.pt: Este episódio me faz rir demais.
translations.he: הפרק הזה גורם לי לצחוק המון.
translations.vi: Tập này làm tôi cười nhiều lắm.
translations.nl: Deze aflevering laat me heel hard lachen.
translations.hi: यह एपिसोड मुझे बहुत हँसाता है.
translations.el: Αυτό το επεισόδιο με κάνει να γελάω πάρα πολύ.
translations.nb: Denne episoden får meg til å le skikkelig mye.
translations.sv: Det här avsnittet får mig att skratta jättemycket.
translations.ro: Episodul ăsta mă face să râd foarte tare.
translations.da: Det her afsnit får mig til at grine helt vildt.
translations.fi: Tämä jakso saa minut nauramaan tosi paljon.
translations.ja: このエピソードはすごく笑わせてくれる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; 'cet' is the masculine form used before vowel-initial nouns.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'fait'.
1st person singular clitic object pronoun; direct object of 'fait' in the causative construction ('faire rire').
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; causative verb taking the infinitive 'rire' as complement.
Adverb of degree/intensity; modifies the infinitive 'rire'.
Infinitive verb serving as complement to 'faire' in a causative construction.
